title: Mushroom Companions
description: A mod that adds living mushroom named Mushy and a evil version named Nushy.
body:
# MUSHROOM COMPANIONS MOD


Welcome to the world of Mushys and Nushy, mushroom based companions to help you on your minecraft journey.

You, the player can craft the Mushys then tame them with bone meal (look at the gallery to see the crafting and images). 

**1K downloads to release a Mushy key ring, Mushy coster and limited time Mushy plushy!**










<details>
<summary>How to tame your Mushy</summary>
Right click Mushy with bone meal to tame it this works for past and future Mushys but penguin Mushy eats raw salmon and Nushy can't be tamed snushy tamed with ancient bonemeal.


</details>
